claims.headline: Boosts endurance
claims.notesSentence: A meta-analysis of human RCTs showed acute taurine supplementation improved endurance-exercise performance.

claims.headline: Supports heart function
claims.notesSentence: Taurine supplementation improved exercise capacity in patients with heart failure in a controlled trial.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Taurine heart failure exercise capacity trial on PubMed
